name: I'm a Fool for You
original_name: 那個傻的 請一直傻下去
overview: Three young boys, who were high school friends, lost contact with each other after graduation. Four years later, they meet each other coincidentally. Although they've grown up and changed, conflicts are occurring between them.

trailers.title: 【香港BL劇2024】"I'm a Fool for You." Season 4 Trailer !!!  《那個傻的 請一直傻下去》第四季預告!!!
